title: alyssum boissieri
intro: Alyssum boissieri, also known as Boissier's Madwort, is a flowering plant species within the Alyssum genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alyssum boissieri include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Alyssum boissieri can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
